channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Hundreds of homes damaged in Mississippi storms as multiple tornadoes reported
item.description: Powerful storms that included at least one confirmed tornado have torn through parts of Mississippi, collapsing hundreds homes, tearing up trees and downing power lines.

item.title: Tennessee poised to vote on new US House map sought by Trump that carves up Memphis
FBI searches Virginia Senate leader’s office as part of corruption probe, AP sources say
